failures.description: The agent misread or incorrectly reasoned over the catalog tool result. The evidence showed the deck material was plastic, so the correct answer should have been yes, but the Executor answered no.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked whether item 2177997696 of the Skateboard has deck material=plastic. The ProductCatalogSearch result at index 3 explicitly returned one matching item with options.deck material = plastic. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, "No, it does not." This decision directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the incorrect answer.
